title: Lead Gun
description: This Data Pack Lets You Lead Mobs Far Away And Pull Them To You.
body:
- **[I Uploaded This Last Night But There Was I Bug I Didn't Know How To Fixed Cuz I Was Very Tired.]**
- **Recipe: Three Cobblestone, One Redstone Dust, Two Sticks, One Lead.**
- **This Data Pack Lets You Lead Mobs Far Away And Pull Them To You.**
- **To Use The Lead Gun Just Right Click With It.**

- **You Can Lead All Players Mobs And Items**

**Injoy This Small And Simple Data Pack :)**

- **Functions:**
- lead_gun:give
